videos.headline: Notre Dame survives Va Tech on game-winning FG
videos.description: Notre Dame gets the win after Jonathan Doerer's 48-yard kick with seconds remaining on the clock.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame survives Va Tech on game-winning FG) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blackshear bounces to the outside for 7-yard Hokie TD
videos.description: Raheem Blackshear bounces off tacklers and gets into the end zone for the 7-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blackshear bounces to the outside for 7-yard Hokie TD) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Austin's huge catch sets up Buchner's TD run
videos.description: Kevin Austin Jr. gets Notre Dame to the Virginia Tech 4-yard line with a 46-yard catch. Tyler Buchner finishes the drive with a 3-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Austin's huge catch sets up Buchner's TD run) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Williams silences Virginia Tech's crowd with the TD
videos.description: Tyler Buchner finds Kyren Williams for hte 8-yard touchdown before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Williams silences Virginia Tech's crowd with the TD) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bracy wrestles ball away from VT WR for the INT
videos.description: Notre Dame's TaRiq Bracy jumps in front of Braxton Burmeister's pass for the interception in Virginia Tech territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bracy wrestles ball away from VT WR for the INT) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyren Williams breaks multiple tackles for ND TD
videos.description: Kyren Williams runs through Virginia Tech tacklers for a 10-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyren Williams breaks multiple tackles for ND TD) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Virginia Tech takes the lead after Waller's pick-6
videos.description: Jermaine Waller steps in front of the pass and takes it to the house for the 26-yard pick-6.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Virginia Tech takes the lead after Waller's pick-6) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Buchner injures lower leg after 2nd INT
videos.description: Tyler Buchner throws his second interception of the day and appears to suffer a lower leg injury.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Buchner injures lower leg after 2nd INT) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Burmeister breaks through and scrambles for 19-yard TD
videos.description: Braxton Burmeister puts Virginia Tech up eight as he scrambles for the impressive 19-yard touchdown run.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Burmeister breaks through and scrambles for 19-yard TD) 2021/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame ties it after Davis TD and 2-point conversion
videos.description: Notre Dame ties the game after Avery Davis scores the touchdown and Kevin Austin Jr. hauls in the impressive catch on the 2-point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame ties it after Davis TD and 2-point conversion) 2021/10/09 ESHEET
